title: 2026 Oscars Best Actress Prediction
text: Deadline's Oscar predictions declare the Best Actress race essentially settled. The contenders include Jessie Buckley in Hamnet, Emma Stone in Bugonia, Renate Reinsve in Sentimental Value, Kate Hudson in Song Sung Blue, and Rose Byrne in If I Had Legs I'd Kick You. After winning at Critics Choice, Golden Globes, BAFTA and the Actor Awards, Buckley's dominant performance across major precursor awards makes her victory virtually assured. The critic notes that Buckley likely secured the award the minute the first screening of Hamnet ended at Telluride. Concerns about her recent film The Bride underperforming at the box office are dismissed as irrelevant since voting concluded before its theatrical release.
